column1: HERA = Housing and Economic Recovery Act. LIHTC = low-income housing tax credit. PIS = LIHTC properties placed in service database.

Note:  Hawaii, Massachusetts, Northern Marianas Islands and New York reported no heads of household for 2%, 2%, 25% and 8% of occupied units, respectively. Connecticut, Hawaii, Kentucky, Massachusetts, Ohio, Tennessee and West Virginia reported more than one head of household for 99%, 98%, 17%, 98%, 35%, 16% and 99.9% of occupied units, respectively.  All other states reported exactly one head of household per unit for over 99% of occupied units.
1 The percentage of occupied units in which reported household members equal reported household size at certification.
2 Information for California was not reported due to migration to a new compliance reporting system.
